_comment: Copy this file to profile.json and fill in YOUR details — this drives all research, scoring and outreach drafts.
services: Short-form video production, Reels, TikTok content, social media management, ad creative
whatYouDo: We create scroll-stopping Reels and short-form video for local businesses — cafés, gyms, salons, boutiques — and manage the whole social presence end-to-end.
whoYouServe: Hospitality, fitness, beauty, and boutique retail businesses with a physical location, good product, and a digital presence gap.
positioning: Premium, bold, visually-led — we don't do generic content
proofPoint: grew a local café's Instagram from 2,000 to 18,000 followers in 4 months with a Reels retainer
